chunks.text: Faculty Publications | EECS at UC Berkeley Faculty Publications - Charles Susskind Books C. Susskind, Heinrich Hertz: A Short Life , San Francisco: San Francisco Press, Inc., 1995. H. Hertz, Heinrich Hertz: Memoirs, Letters, Diaries , J. Hertz, Ed., M. Hertz and C. Susskind, Trans., 2nd enl. ed., San Francisco, CA: San Francisco Press, 1977. C. Susskind, Understanding Technology , Baltimore, MD: The Johns Hopkins University Press, 1973. M. Chodorow and C. Susskind, Fundamentals of Microwave Electronics , International Series in Pure and Applied Physics, New York: McGraw-Hill, 1964. C. Susskind, Ed., The Encyclopedia of Electronics , New York: Reinhold Pub. Corp., 1962. Patents C. Susskind, " Beam control device ," U.S. Patent 2,975,317. March 1961.
